channel.title: Ric 18 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 18 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Firebird - Ric18 - found on eBay
item.description: Short description: Firebird or “Feuervogel” Notes : Taken from eBay . Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 18
item.description: Short description: A marabu Notes: Other entries for this work
